site.metaDescription: A Brown Diary explores physical AI, cybersecurity, automation, digital transformation, business, productivity and life in Germany.

home.headline: A Brown Diary
home.intro: I work across digital transformation, AI implementation, cybersecurity and automation globally. I built life from scratch in Germany and a startup. This diary is where I share what actually works and what does not.
home.supportingText: The combination of physical AI, cybersecurity and digital transformation positions this diary in a practical place in the technology world.

about.headline: Helping practical ideas become useful digital systems
about.intro: A Brown Diary covers the work, lessons and operating notes behind technology, business and life in Germany.
about.body: Use this page for your story, credentials, journey, beliefs and the topics you want readers or clients to understand before they contact you.
